backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing content sections, quiz questions, printable guides, and query methods for retrieving and filtering them.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing new ant-related UI components, integration changes, assets, and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of various frontend components and utilities describing their roles in the application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind-based global stylesheet defining light/dark theme variables and base styling.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML entrypoint mounting the React application and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component setting up React Query and rendering header, educational content, and footer.
frontend/src/components/EducationalConte: Main educational UI with tabs, pest selection controls, and conditional rendering of pest-specific content, quizzes, guides, and scanner.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer displaying attribution, copyright text, and an informational disclaimer.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header with app branding, icon, and tagline using a sticky top navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/pests/ArmyAntsCo: Renders informational content about army ants, including identification, behavior, distribution, and safety guidance.
frontend/src/components/pests/BeetlesCon: Provides beetle identification details, common indoor species, and signs of infestation using structured UI cards and alerts.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackAntsC: Describes black ant characteristics, species, signs of activity, and habitat attractants within a card-based UI layout.
frontend/src/components/pests/BlackStink: Explains how to identify black stink bugs, their behaviors, and signs of presence using alerts and informational cards.
frontend/src/components/pests/CarpenterA: Outlines carpenter ant identification, structural risks, warning alerts, and infestation indicators in a UI card structure.
frontend/src/components/pests/Cockroache: Covers cockroach identification, common species, safety notices, and signs of infestation using multiple structured cards.
frontend/src/components/pests/HeadLiceCo: Displays educational content about identifying, checking for, and understanding the signs and spread of head lice using cards and alerts.
frontend/src/components/pests/MiceConten: Provides guidance on identifying mice, signs of infestation, nesting materials, and typical indoor habitats through structured UI cards.
frontend/src/components/pests/MothsLarva: Explains how to identify moths and larvae, recognize infestation signs, and understand common locations and attractants.
frontend/src/components/pests/RedAntsCon: Shows safety warnings and details on identifying red ants, common species, infestation signs, and nesting habitats.
frontend/src/components/pests/ScorpionsC: Offers safety information and descriptions of scorpion identification, species, signs of presence, and typical habitats and behavior.
frontend/src/components/pests/SpidersCon: Renders educational content about identifying spiders, signs of their presence, and safety warnings.
frontend/src/components/pests/WoodBeetle: Displays information on identifying wood‑boring beetles, infestation signs, and common locations.
frontend/src/components/PhotoScanner.tsx: Provides a full photo scanning interface with camera capture, file upload, image editing, saving, tagging, and exporting functionality.
Displays downloadable PDF guides for a quiz section, handling loading states and file downloads.
frontend/src/components/Quiz.tsx: Implements a quiz flow with question navigation, answer selection, result calculation, and completion feedback.
frontend/src/components/SavedScansGaller: Shows a gallery of saved scans with tag-based filtering, reordering, deletion, and tag editing support.
frontend/src/components/SavedScanTagsEdi: Lets users add, edit, and remove tags on saved scans with inline editing controls.
frontend/src/components/sections/Habitat: Shows bed bug habitat details, feeding behavior, and lifecycle with supporting images.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeatTre: Implements a safety reminder dialog for heat‑treatment preparations with confirmation handling.
frontend/src/components/sections/Identif: Provides visual and textual guidance for identifying bed bugs, their life stages, and bite signs.
frontend/src/components/sections/Prevent: Outlines bed bug prevention tips, including travel precautions and used‑furniture inspection steps.
frontend/src/components/sections/Treatme: Renders a heat‑treatment checklist UI with reminder gating and progress tracking using custom hooks.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor tied to Internet Identity and refreshes dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useHeatTreatmentCheck: Tracks checklist item completion in localStorage and provides helpers for toggling items and computing progress stats.
Manages a reminder-confirmation dialog state and persists confirmation status in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useImageEditor.ts: Processes images with rotation, zoom, and enhancement options and supports exporting and resetting edits.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching quiz questions, results, and printable guides from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useSavedScans.ts: Handles saving, updating, tagging, reordering, and deleting scanned images stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines Tailwind layers and extensive light/dark OKLCH color variables plus base/global styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity provider.
frontend/src/utils/imageProcessing.ts: Provides client-side image utilities including rotate, enhance, zoom, and crop using canvas.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom OKLCH theme colors, radius, animations, and plugins.
project_state.json: Stores project state metadata, feature list, and required pest icon images.
